creator: lenzi@k1.com.br
text:
[DESCRIBE CHANGES]

Added file(s):
- files/patch-eiciel-nautulis_page.cpp

Port maintainer (andreas@syndrom23.de) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

Fix: 

--kBOLwcM9046901.1166997518/k1.com.br----SOG0eS2sfwr4tQsF2DR33elYfQSzM1UoCgRqFnbjpzFCfcJ9
Content-Type: text/plain; name="eiciel-0.9.1.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="eiciel-0.9.1.patch"

diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/sysutils/eiciel/files/patch-eiciel-nautulis_page.cpp /fileserver/ports/sysutils/eiciel/files/patch-eiciel-nautulis_page.cpp
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/eiciel/files/patch-eiciel-nautulis_page.cpp	Wed Dec 31 21:00:00 1969
+++ /fileserver/ports/sysutils/eiciel/files/patch-eiciel-nautulis_page.cpp	Sat Dec 23 13:52:39 2006
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- src/eiciel_nautilus_page.cpp.orig	Sat Dec 23 13:51:31 2006
++++ src/eiciel_nautilus_page.cpp	Sat Dec 23 13:51:42 2006
+@@ -93,6 +93,8 @@
+ 	// Ara obtenim la URI de Nautilus
+ 	uri = nautilus_file_info_get_uri (file);
+ 	GnomeVFSURI* guri = gnome_vfs_uri_new(uri);
++	if (!guri)
++		return NULL;
+ 	// i comprovem que és local
+ 	const gchar* scheme = gnome_vfs_uri_get_scheme(guri);
+ 	if (strcmp(scheme, "file") != 0)
How-To-Repeat: in the gnome/nautilus environment,
ask for the properties of an object invalid or unknon
to the gnome vfs may be to a bug or malfunction in the vfs..

the call to the vfs returns an null uri, that
if not tested, will make nautilus abort.
